channel.title: Example RSS Feed
channel.description: An example feed for collector tests

item.title: First Post
item.description: This is the short description body that must never be stored.
item.content:encoded: This is the FULL article body text that must never be stored in articles.content.

item.title: Second Post No Guid
item.description: Another body that should be discarded.
item.content:encoded: Full text of the second post, should not persist.

item.title: No Link Item
item.description: Body with no link; whole item should be skipped.
